title: Shulkers In Shulkers *updated version*
description: The updated version of Shulkers In Shulkers for the later versions of minecraft. Supports 1.20.1-1.21.6
body:
## Mod: **Shulkers Inside Shulkers**

**Description:**  
This simple mod allows you to place shulkers inside other shulkers, offering increased storage flexibility and convenience.

### Important Note:
- ⚠️ **Caution:** Using this mod can clear your NBT item browser in Creative mode. Use with care!

### Version Compatibility:
- **Current Support:** 1.20.1, 1.20.6, and 1.21.
- This is an unofficial updated version of [Shulkers In Shulkers](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkersinshulkers) by **ang-xd**.

### Credits:
- Full credit to the original mod maker, **ang-xd**. My version simply adds support for 1.20.1 and up and will continue to support later updates as they are released.

---

Enjoy expanded storage options with this mod, and make sure to follow for future updates!
